title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises!
